'''Karlon''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]].

==Biography==
After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Karlon's parents on [[Ando/Legends|Ando]], Karlon was responsible for the upbringing of his younger sister [[Gondara]].

Karlon and Gondara joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He also became best friends with [[Tamo Lan]], the [[Medic/Legends|medic]] of [[Shroud Team]].

Unfortunately, Karlon was killed in a [[Battle of Bresnia|battle]] against [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on [[Bresnia]]. Tamo Lan took Gondara under his wing after that.
